domain: Mande jeli/griot West African hereditary oral tradition (children raised in jeli families from infancy in verbal art + music + genealogy; learn via observation + repetition + guided participation; practice short passages of actual pieces; multi-instrument kora/balafon/ngoni; years of spiritual+artistic training)
specific_mechanism: GRIOT-HEREDITARY-DISTILL: hereditary multi-instrument multi-stage distillation training. (1) Parent-LLM (teacher) generates short repeated passages from real production tasks (not synthetic exercises). (2) Child-LLM (student) initialized from parent's weights (hereditary init). (3) Observation-repetition-expansion practice loop: student observes parent output o_parent; reproduces o_student; gradually expands to longer/complex variations. (4) Multi-instrument: student trained simultaneously on K task families (kora=summary, balafon=Q&A, ngoni=reasoning) with shared backbone + task-specific heads. (5) Interpretation tax: free-improvisation penalty L_improv = -cos(o_student, o_parent) for rote-copying; encourages adaptive variation. (6) Differs from standard KD by hereditary init + multi-task simultaneous + interpretation tax.
llm_application: GRIOT-HEREDITARY-DISTILL hereditary parent-weight init + observation-repetition-expansion loop + multi-instrument parallel + interpretation tax. Differs from R407 + R410. R432 SONGLINE-CURRICULUM. R446 OTEA-APARIMA. R458 AIKIDO-KATA. R464 ARNIS-FLOW. R483 JIEQI-24-STAGE-CURRICULUM. Differs from Delta-KD TMLR 2026 (closest — student mimics teacher + behavioral-transformation encoding, but no hereditary init + no multi-instrument). LLMs as Teacher (standard). Imitation Learning Hierarchical RL. Continual Learning Survey. Differs by HEREDITARY PARENT-WEIGHT INIT + OBSERVATION-REPETITION-EXPANSION + MULTI-INSTRUMENT MULTI-TASK + INTERPRETATION TAX FREE-IMPROVISATION.
novelty_claim: Delta-KD + Imitation Learning + Continual Learning cover student-teacher distillation paradigm. GRIOT-HEREDITARY-DISTILL adds (a) hereditary parent-weight init + (b) observation-repetition-expansion + (c) multi-instrument task family + (d) interpretation tax. Recombination — borderline lookup.
